nasb.text: For amazement had seized him and all his companions because of the catch of fish which they had taken;

esv.text: For he and all who were with him were astonished at the catch of fish that they had taken,

cnv.text: 他和跟他在一起的人，因這網所打的魚，都十分驚駭。

ccb.text: 他和所有同伴们对捕到这么多鱼感到非常惊讶，

csbs.text: 那时，他和所有与他一起的人，都对这一网捕到的鱼惊讶不已。
